questions.prompt: Describe your ideal day briefly.
questions.promptZh: 简短描述你理想的一天。

questions.sampleAnswer: In the morning I read books. After class I meet friends. I feel happy.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 早上我读书，课后见朋友，感觉很开心。

questions.sampleAnswerZh: 今天天气晴朗温暖，我感到精力充沛。

questions.promptZh: 介绍一个你喜欢的爱好。

questions.sampleAnswer: My hobby is reading because it is interesting and relaxing.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我的爱好是阅读，因为它有趣又放松。

questions.prompt: Describe a skill you want to learn and why.
questions.promptZh: 描述一项你想学的技能及原因。

questions.sampleAnswer: I want to learn public speaking because it is helpful for my future career.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我想学演讲，因为它对未来职业有帮助。

questions.prompt: Do you prefer online or classroom learning? Why?
questions.promptZh: 你更喜欢线上学习还是课堂学习？为什么？

questions.sampleAnswer: I prefer classroom learning because I can interact with teachers and classmates.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我更喜欢课堂教学，因为可以和老师同学互动。

questions.prompt: Talk about a memorable trip.
questions.promptZh: 谈谈一次难忘的旅行。

questions.sampleAnswer: Last summer I went to the mountains with my family. I enjoyed the beautiful views.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 去年夏天我和家人去了山里，很享受美景。

questions.prompt: What makes a good friend?
questions.promptZh: 好朋友应具备什么品质？
questions.answer: A good friend is honest and kind. They support you when you need help.
questions.sampleAnswer: A good friend is honest and kind. They support you when you need help.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 好朋友诚实善良，在你需要时支持你。

questions.prompt: How do you manage stress before exams?
questions.promptZh: 考试前你如何缓解压力？
questions.answer: I make a study plan, exercise, and sleep well.
questions.sampleAnswer: I make a study plan, exercise, and sleep well.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我会制定学习计划，锻炼并保证睡眠。

questions.prompt: Prefer team work or working alone? Why?
questions.promptZh: 你更喜欢团队合作还是独自工作？为什么？
questions.answer: I prefer working in teams because we can share ideas and finish complex tasks more efficiently.
questions.sampleAnswer: I prefer working in teams because we can share ideas and finish complex tasks more efficiently.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我更喜欢团队合作，因为可以分享想法并更高效完成复杂任务。

questions.prompt: Should students have part-time jobs? Explain.
questions.promptZh: 学生应不应该做兼职？请说明。
questions.answer: I agree students can have part-time jobs if they balance study and work.
questions.sampleAnswer: I agree students can have part-time jobs if they balance study and work.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 我同意学生可以兼职，但要平衡学习与工作。

questions.prompt: Describe a community problem and a solution.

questions.answer: Traffic congestion is a problem. The city should improve public transport.
questions.sampleAnswer: Traffic congestion is a problem. The city should improve public transport.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 交通拥堵是个问题。城市应改善公共交通。

questions.prompt: Is technology making people more isolated?
questions.promptZh: 科技是否让人更孤立？给出理由。
questions.answer: Technology can isolate people, but it can also help them connect globally.
questions.sampleAnswer: Technology can isolate people, but it can also help them connect globally.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 科技可能让人孤立，也能帮助人们全球连接。

questions.prompt: Do you like reading? What kind of books?

questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, I like reading novels because they help me relax and improve my vocabulary.
questions.sampleAnswerZh: 喜欢，我喜欢读小说，因为能放松并扩大词汇量。

questions.prompt: How can schools better prepare students for work?
questions.promptZh: 雅思 Part3：学校如何更好帮助学生适应职场？

questions.sampleAnswerZh: 学校应提供实习并教授沟通技能。

questions.prompt: What do you usually do on weekends?

questions.prompt: Advantages of learning a foreign language?
